title: ChangeFileOperation
description: ChangeFileOperation for creating, updating or deleting a file

content.description: new or updated file content, must be base64 encoded

from_path.description: old path of the file to move

operation.description: indicates what to do with the file

path.description: path to the existing or new file

sha.description: sha is the SHA for the file that already exists, required for update or delete
